headline: Egg Prices Have Collapsed. Here's Which Stocks Could Win And Lose
summary: As egg prices decline, here's what the USDA data could mean for Cal-Maine Foods, General Mills, Kraft Heinz and other companies.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Conagra Brands, Lowers Price Target to $16
summary: Barclays  analyst Andrew Lazar   maintains Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $18 to $16.
